headline: Kroger (KR) Stock Gets Price Target Boost from Evercore; the Company Projects 1%–2% Comparable Sales Growth for 2026
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 9, Evercore ISI analyst Michael Montani raised the firm’s price recommendation on The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) to $83 from $81. The firm reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. headline: Assessing Kroger’s (NYSE:KR) Valuation As Analyst Optimism Meets New CEO Transformation Strategy
summary: Kroger (KR) is back in focus after fresh earnings, new CEO priorities, and analyst attention converged, with recent results, guidance, and capital returns giving investors more concrete data to judge the supermarket group. See our latest analysis for Kroger. That context helps explain why Kroger’s share price has held its ground and moved higher over time, with a 17.96% 3 month share price return and a 5 year total shareholder return of 124.27%. This points to solid long term compounding...

headline: Hurray's GIRL BEER Announces $5M Funding Round and Retail Expansion into Walmart, Kroger, and Albertsons
summary: Hurray's GIRL BEER, the humor-led flavored light beer brand leading a new wave of beer built for the next generation of drinkers, today announced a new funding round led by Lakehouse Ventures, with participation from Spice Capital, CPG industry insiders, entertainment executives - and, notably, despite the brand's arbitrary ban of one guy named Connor, another guy named Connor.
